reviews.comment:
Nos pareció muy mal que dentro del horario de trabajo no nos quisieron atender porque estaban cerrando caja cuando aún no había cambio de turno, nosotros veníamos de viaje y tuvimos q ir a otra estación por dicho motivo. Una lástima q sea así...

(Translated by Google)
We were very upset that they refused to serve us during working hours because they were closing the register before the shift change. We were traveling and had to go to another station for that reason. It's a shame that it's like this...
